title: Galearia physodes
taxonomy: Galearia physodes is classified in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification places it within the flowering plant division, specifically in the monocot group. Galearia physodes is further categorized into the subfamily Orchidoideae, which includes a large number of terrestrial orchids. The genus Galearia belongs to the tribe Orchideae, a sub-tribe within the Orchidoideae subfamily. Galearia physodes is native to the mountainous regions of Asia and Europe.
